race.comment: ROYAL GUARDIAN (4) got the job done in a photo finish before getting well back and finishing 2.1L off the winner over this track and trip. She did pull up with an issue there however and this shapes favourably for her. Can return to form in a big way. IDEALLY (1) has missed narrowly in her past two runs, beaten a neck last start at this track and trip. She's inching towards another victory and Faithfull remains in the saddle. Drawn slightly better today and can get the job done. SHOOT TO FAME (9) steps out to this trip for the first time after sticking on nicely at Pinjarra last time out. Out to 1760m creates interest and if she can improve on recent runs, she'll be hard to fend off. ELECTRIC BEC (7) missed narrowly first-up when straight out over this track and trip. Fitter now and she looks an improver. MYSTICAL WISDOM (10) hasn't been far away his past couple and a better draw this time around.
